blocks.text:
In `~/opensession`, run:
1) git add crates/local-db/src/lib.rs
2) git commit -m "refactor(local-db): remove legacy session fallback helpers"
3) git push
Return commit hash, branch, and push result. If any command fails, include exact failing command and stderr head.
Running the three git commands in `~/opensession` now and I’ll report the commit hash, branch, and push status, including exact failure details if anything errors.
